title: thelypteris dejecta
intro: Thelypteris dejecta, also known as the Dejected Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Thelypteris dejecta include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and aid in the treatment of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Thelypteris dejecta is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
